ocr_findings.description: Decorative chapter-opening illustrations (computer monitor graphic, stationery illustration, mascot dog) replaced by img-0.jpeg and img-1.jpeg placeholders. These are purely decorative with no text content.
Arrow annotation '← 本章はココ！' adjacent to '開発技術' row in the table is captured as a separate trailing line '本章はココ！' in OCR — positional context lost but text preserved.
Syllabus position table (分野/大分類) rendered correctly as markdown table with merged-cell rows using empty first column. Structure faithfully preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page is the chapter-opening page for 第6章 開発技術. It has a large chapter title heading, a short intro paragraph, a 'key points' box with two bullet items, a syllabus URL citation, and a syllabus-position table. This is consistent with chapter_title classification (large heading + limited body on opener page). AGREE with existing label — marked DISAGREE field corrected: both reviewer and existing agree on chapter_title.
